M1016_CHGREG_ICD_NA M1016 Regimen Change in Past 14 Days- NA This field is checked if there have been no medical or treatment regimen changes within the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (Not NA), 1 = Checked (NA) CHAR 1 x
